nasb.text: “Many times they have persecuted me from my youth up; Yet they have not prevailed against me.

esv.text: “Greatly have they afflicted me from my youth, yet they have not prevailed against me.

cnv.text: 從我幼年以來，敵人雖然多次苦害我， 卻沒有勝過我。

ccb.text: 我从小就深受仇敌的迫害， 但他们没能胜过我。

csbs.text: 从我年幼以来，他们就多次苦害我， 但他们不能胜过我。
